_comment: 2026 draft from reference/2026 World Cup Selections.xlsx ('Ecudaor' read as Ecuador). Scoring agreed 2026-06-10; third_place_final pending group decision (default off).

bracket._comment: R16 pods in bracket (tree) order for a fully bracket-aware best_possible. Each pod lists the four R32 participants that funnel into one Round-of-16 match; pods 0&1 meet in a QF, pods 0-3 share a SF half, pods 4-7 the other. Source: ESPN 2026 bracket, cross-checked against data/matches.json R32 fixtures on 2026-07-02. Self-validates at scoring time (see _bracket_leaves); ignored if it stops matching the fixtures.
